subcategory: animated marquee hero with infinite scroll images
use_cases: Landing pages needing dynamic product or brand showcase with animated visuals
Marketing sites requiring engaging hero sections with call-to-action buttons
Portfolio or creative websites showcasing visual content with marquee effects
E-commerce product pages highlighting multiple items in a looping animated display
SaaS landing pages wanting animated hero sections with taglines and CTAs
ai_summary: AnimatedMarqueeHero is a full-screen hero component featuring an infinite scrolling marquee of images combined with fade-in animated text content, tagline badge, and a prominent CTA button. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations including hover scale effects and spring transitions. Uses backdrop blur and shadow styling for a modern, polished aesthetic suitable for landing pages and marketing sites.
